title: Automatically build and clear native build when running `pnpm build`
Turbopack Persistence: Improve heuristic for compacted database access

sample_additions: Therefore there are these value types:
- INLINE: Values ≤ 8 bytes stored directly in key blocks within `*.sst` files.
- SMALL: Values 9–4096 bytes packed into shared value blocks within `*.sst` files.

title: [turbopack] Make compression in SST files optional

sample_additions: - 4 bytes block header (uncompressed length or sentinel)

title: Add inline value support for small values (≤8 bytes)

sample_additions: - 8..255: inlined value (currently only values ≤8 bytes are inlined, though the format supports up to 247)
- (type - 8) bytes value data (inline, no separate value block)

title: Turbopack: allow key block without hash in SST files

sample_additions: - 1 byte block type (1: key block with hash, 2: key block without hash)
The block type determines whether the key hash is stored per entry:
- Block type 1 (with hash): Full 8-byte hash stored per entry

Check out the [deployment documentation](https://payloadcms.com/docs/production/deployment) for details on how to deploy your project.

title: feat(db-*): adds support for readReplicas in D1 adapter config

sample_additions: **This can only be deployed on Paid Workers right now due to size limits.** This template comes configured with the bare minimum to get started on anything you need.

You can enable read replicas by adding `readReplicas: 'first-primary'` in the DB adapter and then enabling it on your D1 Cloudflare dashboard. Read more about this feature on [our docs](https://payloadcms.com/docs/database/sqlite#d1-read-replicas).

sample_additions: - `@trigger.dev/database` exports a Prisma 6.14.0 client that is used extensively in the webapp to access a PostgreSQL instance. The schema file is [schema.prisma](mdc:internal-packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma)
- All the "services" that are found in app/v3/services/\*_/_.server.ts
- We use "presenters" to move more complex loader code into a class, and you can find those are app/v3/presenters/\*_/_.server.ts

title: docs: note that product databases need infra provisioning

sample_additions: Locally (`DEBUG=1`), it auto-connects to `posthog_visual_review` on localhost. In prod, the infrastructure handles env vars and connections automatically. If the env var is absent, the route is silently skipped.

title: feat: Support for integration in BigQuery destination tests

sample_additions: BigQuery batch exports can be tested against a real BigQuery instance, but doing so requires additional setup. BigQuery currently supports multiple authentication mechanisms:
1. Authenticating directly with a JSON key file
2. Using an integration populated with a JSON key file

title: chore(mcp): normalize feature names

sample_additions: You can limit which tools are available by adding query parameters to the MCP URL. If no features are specified, all tools are available. When features are specified, only tools matching those features are exposed.
